data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-channel capability (email, SMS, push notification) for the saga. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual implementation or support for these channels. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle but fails to address the specific multi-channel requirement, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming multi-channel support (email, SMS, push notification) is implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
